page_metadata.biotools__summary: Application that designs allele-specific (AS) primers for detecting SNPs and mutations. WASP input can be either key searches (Section A) or SNPs with flanking sequences (Section B).
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Application that designs allele-specific (AS) primers for detecting SNPs and mutations. WASP input can be either key searches (Section A) or SNPs with flanking sequences (Section B).
